description: User dwells on the flight search results page, likely reviewing the available flight options and prices for the Brisbane to London route.

description: User clicks the browser back button to return to the previous page.
The page navigates from the flight search results back to the Webjet homepage.
User clicks on the 'Leaving From' input field in the flight search widget, which triggers the display of recent searches and popular airports.
